items.title: Empowering Indian app innovators: Applications open for Google Play Accelerator India
items.summary: Applications are now open for the third cohort of Google Play Accelerator India. This three-month, equity-free program is designed to support high-potential, AI-powered Indian startups in the apps and games space, providing them with the tools, mentorship, and technology needed to build world-class products for India and the world. Apply by June 1, 2026.
